market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.32%, Nasdaq +0.34%, Dow +0.02%. Commodities led sectors (+3.30%) while Communication Services lagged (-1.60%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +2.15%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +22.20%. Key headline: Iran war could prompt Federal Reserve to raise rates, Pimco says - Financial Times — headwind for risk assets.
